headlines.headline: Zelvix Therapeutics recalls products in supply chain optimization line due to quality concerns

sentiment.reasoning: A product recall due to quality concerns creates immediate operational disruption and potential reputational damage that may persist as the company addresses the supply chain issue.

headlines.headline: Zelvix Therapeutics reports unexpected decline in Scandinavia revenue

sentiment.reasoning: An unexpected revenue decline in a specific region is a negative financial indicator that directly impacts earnings expectations.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
